heroHeadline: ICE Shifts to 'Quieter' Enforcement as Arrests Plunge After Minnesota Pullout; 70.8% of Detainees Have No Criminal Conviction
heroSubtitle: After Operation Metro Surge backlash, ICE books fewer than 1,000 migrants/day — down from 1,400+ peak; TRAC data shows 2 of 3 Trump-era arrests targeted immigrants with no criminal record; Army sergeant's wife detained at military base released under GPS monitor as deportation proceeds
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
